summary: Completed comprehensive testing of CRM system - backend APIs, frontend UI, authentication flow, and responsive design. All core functionality working correctly.

All CRUD endpoints (clients, suppliers, products, warehouses, inventory, orders, invoices) responding with proper auth checks
